name: toeicpass
description: TOEIC learning and enterprise IP test platform monorepo

scripts.build: npm run -w apps/api build && npm run -w apps/web build
scripts.dev:web: npm run -w apps/web start || (npm run -w apps/web build && npm run -w apps/web start)
scripts.test: npm run -w apps/api test && npm run -w apps/web test
scripts.lint: npm run -w apps/api lint && npm run -w apps/web lint

author: toeicPass
